description_long: This is a modern, rectangular front-loading washing machine with a smooth, hard exterior surface, predominantly white in color. The front face features a large circular door with a prominent handle, a control panel above the door with several dials and buttons, and a detergent drawer on the upper left. The sides and back are plain and unadorned, with no visible vents or panels. The control panel includes labeled dials and buttons, likely for selecting wash cycles and settings, and a small display or indicator area. The washing machine is designed to be freestanding and robust, suitable for placement in urban environments such as laundromats, garages, or utility rooms.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a large circular door, a top-mounted control panel with dials and buttons, and a detergent drawer. The design is modern, smooth, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular door with handle, control panel with dials and buttons, and detergent drawer.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless surface with the edge of the door and control panel just visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain, flat surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain and featureless, with the door's side profile slightly visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring three rotary dials, one push button, and a detergent drawer on the left. The panel includes labeled sections and indicator markings.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door made of plastic and glass with a prominent integrated handle on the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the upper left of the control panel, with the text 'BRAND' and a small symbol.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left of the control panel, designed as a pull-out compartment.
